summary: Iteration 50: Full day build session features tested. Backend: 19/19 tests pass. Frontend: All 5 new features verified (Landing Page, Login Update, Signup Wizard, Demo Page, War Room Upgrade).

landing_page.details: Full marketing landing page at / with: dark navy hero section, 'Your church deserves better technology' headline, Sign In/Get Started nav buttons, social proof bar (11/64,500/$151M/3 stats), problem section (3 cards), feature grid (6 features), comparison table, pricing section (3 tiers: $499/$1,499/$2,999), vision section with Solomon Pay waitlist form, final CTA, footer with 2026 copyright

login_page_update.details: Login page at /login shows 'Your church. Elevated.' tagline below logo. NO 'Church Management Platform' text exists. 'Start Free Trial' link present below form.

signup_wizard.details: 3-step wizard at /signup: Step 1 (Your Church) - church name, city, state, denomination, member count; Step 2 (Your Account) - first name, last name, email, role, password, confirm; Step 3 (Launch) - summary with church/location/admin/email/plan, Launch Solomon AI button

demo_page.details: Demo request page at /demo with 'See Solomon AI in action' header, form with first name, last name, church name, email, phone, member count, interests checkboxes (Replacing Planning Center, Reducing giving fees, Kids Check-In, Multi-campus management, AI assistant, Solomon Pay early adopter), Request Demo button

war_room_upgrade.details: Dark navy mission-control layout at /war-room with: 8 KPI cards (Members Present, Kids in Sunday School, Volunteers on Duty, First-Time Visitors, Given Today, MTD Giving, Cafe Orders, Merch Sales), Real-Time Activity feed with seed data when no live data, Giving Momentum sparkline (5 weeks), LIVE badge with pulsing green dot, clock with date/time, quick action buttons (View Kids Check-In, View Giving, Send Announcement)

backend_waitlist_endpoint.details: POST /api/waitlist/solomon-pay accepts email and church_name, returns success, handles duplicates gracefully

backend_demo_requests_endpoint.details: POST /api/demo-requests accepts first_name, church_name, email (required) plus optional fields, returns success with '24 hours' message

backend_register_church_endpoint.details: POST /api/auth/register-church creates tenant + admin user + session, returns token with church_admin role and is_first_login=true

backend_war_room_endpoint.details: GET /api/admin/war-room returns counters (8 KPIs), activity_feed, giving_trend (5 data points), capacity, is_seed_data flag. Uses realistic seed data when no live Sunday data exists.

critical_code_review_comments: All new pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Landing page has all 9 sections as specified (nav, hero, social proof, problem, solution, comparison, pricing, vision, final CTA, footer)
Signup wizard correctly validates required fields before advancing steps
War Room uses seed data (is_seed_data: true) when no live Sunday data exists - shows 47 kids, 312 members, $28,450 given
Backend register-church endpoint uses hashlib.sha256 for password hashing (consistent with existing auth)
All new endpoints have proper validation and error handling
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 50 verified all full day build session features: 1) Landing Page at / with complete marketing layout (hero, social proof, problem, features, comparison, pricing, vision with waitlist, CTA, footer), 2) Login page updated with 'Your church. Elevated.' tagline (no 'Church Management Platform' text), 3) Signup 3-step wizard (Your Church -> Your Account -> Launch), 4) Demo request page with form and interest checkboxes, 5) War Room upgrade with dark mission-control layout, 8 KPI cards, activity feed, giving sparkline, LIVE badge, clock. Backend endpoints: /api/waitlist/solomon-pay, /api/demo-requests, /api/auth/register-church, /api/admin/war-room all working correctly.
